scripts.dev: concurrently -n WEB,API -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @wayfare/web" "npm run dev -w @wayfare/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @wayfare/api && npm run build -w @wayfare/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @wayfare/api && npm run lint -w @wayfare/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @wayfare/api && npm run typecheck -w @wayfare/web
scripts.start: concurrently -n WEB,API -c cyan,magenta "npm run start -w @wayfare/web" "npm run start -w @wayfare/api"
